column8: deWenn Glutexo mit seinem Schwanz schwingt, steigt die Temperatur ins Unermessliche.
column9: enWhen it swings its burning tail, it elevates the air temperature to unbearably high levels.
column10: enIt lashes about with its tail to knock down its foe. It then tears up the fallen opponent with sharp claws.
column11: deEs schlägt im Kampf mit seinem Schwanz nach seinen Gegnern. Anschließend zerfetzt es die Gegner mit seinen scharfen Klauen.
column12: enIt has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes away with sharp claws.
column13: deEs ist brutal veranlagt. Im Kampf schlägt es mit seinem brennenden Schweif um sich und schlitzt Gegner mit seinen scharfen Klauen auf.
column14: enIt is very hotheaded by nature, so it constantly seeks opponents. It calms down only when it wins.
column15: enTough fights could excite this POKéMON. When excited, it may blow out bluish-white flames.
column16: enWhen it swings its burning tail, it elevates the air temperature to  unbearably high levels.
column17: enIf it becomes agitated during battle, it spouts intense flames, incinerating its surroundings.
column18: enCharmeleon mercilessly destroys its foes using its sharp claws. If it encounters a strong foe, it turns aggressive. In this excited state, the flame at the tip of its tail flares with a bluish white color.
column19: enTough fights could excite this Pokémon. When excited, it may breathe out bluish-white flames.
column20: enCHARMELEON mercilessly destroys its foes using its sharp claws. If it encounters a strong foe, it turns aggressive. In this excited state, the flame at the tip of its tail flares with a bluish white color.
column21: deGnadenlos besiegt Glutexo seine Gegner mit seinen scharfen Klauen. Wenn es auf starke Gegner trifft, wird es wütend und die Flamme auf seiner Schweifspitze flackert in einem bläulichen Ton.
column22: deGlutexo attackiert seine Feinde mit aller Gewalt und unter Einsatz seiner scharfen Krallen. Trifft es auf starke Gegner, wird es wütend und die Flamme auf seiner Schweifspitze flackert in einem bläulichen Ton.
column23: enWithout pity, its sharp claws destroy foes. If it encounters a strong enemy, it becomes agitated, and the flame on its tail flares with a bluish white color.
column24: deKämpft es länger gegen starke Gegner, so gerät es in Aufregung und spuckt manchmal gleißend helle, bläuliche Flammen.
column25: enIn the rocky mountains where CHARMELEON live, their fiery tails shine at night like stars.
column26: enIn the rocky mountains where Charmeleon live, their fiery tails shine at night like stars.
column27: enWhen it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.
column28: deSteigert es sich in einen Kampf hinein, spuckt es Flammen, die alles in seiner Umgebung niederbrennen.

column8: enSpits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.

column17: enCharizard flies around the sky in search of powerful opponents. It breathes fire of such great heat that it melts anything. However, it never turns its fiery breath on any opponent weaker than itself.
column18: enIts wings can carry this POKéMON close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.
column19: enIf CHARIZARD becomes furious, the flame at the tip of its tail flares up in a whitish-blue color.
column20: enIt uses its wings to fly high. The temperature of its fire increases as it gains experience in battle.
column21: enWhen this Pokémon expels a blast of superhot fire, the red flame at the tip of its tail burns more intensely.
column22: enIf CHARIZARD becomes furious, the flame at the tip of its tail flares up in a light blue shade.
column23: enIt spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.
column24: deWenn dieses Pokémon einen Strahl glühenden Feuers speit, leuchtet seine Schwanzspitze auf.
column25: enWhen expelling a blast of super hot fire, the red flame at the tip of its tail burns more intensely.
column26: deDieses Pokémon kann mit seinen Flügeln eine Höhe von bis zu 1400 m erreichen. Es spuckt sehr heißes Feuer.
column27: enIt is said that CHARIZARD’s fire burns hotter if it has experienced harsh battles.
column28: enIts wings can carry this Pokémon close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.
column29: deDieses Pokémon kann mit seinen Flügeln eine Höhe von bis zu 1 400 m erreichen. Es spuckt sehr heißes Feuer.
column30: enBreathing intense, hot flames, it can melt almost anything. Its breath inflicts terrible pain on enemies.

column8: deSchiggys Panzer dient nicht nur zum Schutz. Die runde Form und die Furchen auf der Oberfläche verringern den Widerstand im Wasser, sodass dieses Pokémon sehr schnell schwimmen kann.
column9: enIts shell is not just for protection. Its rounded shape and the grooves on its surface minimize resistance in water, enabling SQUIRTLE to swim at high speeds.
column10: enSQUIRTLE’s shell is not merely used for protection. The shell’s rounded shape and the grooves on its surface help minimize resistance in water, enabling this POKéMON to swim at high speeds.
column11: enWhen it feels threatened, it draws its legs inside its shell and sprays water from its mouth.
column12: enAfter birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. It powerfully sprays foam  from its mouth.
column13: deDieses Pokémon jagt mit einem Wasserstrahl. Bei Gefahr zieht es sich in seinen Panzer zurück.
column14: enWhen it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.
column15: enIt shelters itself in its shell then strikes back with spouts of water at every opportunity.
column16: enThe shell, which hardens soon after it is born, is resilient. If you poke it, it will bounce back out.
column17: enThe shell is soft when it is born. It soon becomes so resilient, prodding fingers will bounce off it.
column18: enWhen it feels threatened, it draws its limbs inside its shell and sprays water from its mouth.
column19: enIt shelters itself in its shell, then strikes back with spouts of water at every opportunity.
column20: deEs zieht sich in seinen Panzer zurück und greift dann mit Wasserstrahlen seine Gegner an.
column21: deZieht es seinen langen Hals in seinen Panzer zurück, verspritzt es Wasser mit unbändiger Kraft.
column22: deFühlt es sich bedroht, verkriecht es sich in seinen Panzer und spuckt Wasser aus seinem Maul.
column23: enSquirtle’s shell is not merely used for protection. The shell’s rounded shape and the grooves on its surface help minimize resistance in water, enabling this Pokémon to swim at high speeds.
column24: deEs greift seine Beute aus dem Wasser heraus mit einem Wasserstrahl an. Bei Gefahr zieht es sich in seinen Panzer zurück.
column25: enAfter birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.
column26: enShoots water at prey while in the water. Withdraws into its shell when in danger.

column8: deEs balanciert geschickt mit seinen buschigen Ohren und dem Schweif, während es im Wasser schwimmt.
column9: enOften hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance.
column10: enThis POKéMON is very popular as a pet. Its fur-covered tail is a symbol of its longevity.
column11: enIt is a well-established symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that WARTORTLE is very old.
column12: enIts tail is large and covered with a rich, thick fur. The tail becomes increasingly deeper in color as WARTORTLE ages. The scratches on its shell are evidence of this POKéMON’s toughness as a battler.
column13: enIts tail is large and covered with a rich, thick fur. The tail becomes increasingly deeper in color as Wartortle ages. The scratches on its shell are evidence of this Pokémon’s toughness as a battler.
column14: enIts large tail is covered with rich, thick fur that deepens in color with age. The scratches on its shell are evidence of this POKéMON’s toughness in battle.
column15: enIt cleverly controls its furry ears and tail to maintain its balance while swimming.
column16: deWenn es einen Schlag auf den Kopf bekommt, zieht es sich in seinen Panzer zurück. Seine Schwanzspitze ragt jedoch ein wenig heraus.
column17: enIts long, furry tail is a symbol of longevity, making it quite popular among older people.
column18: deBei Gefahr zieht dieses Pokémon seinen Kopf ein. Die Schwanzspitze ragt jedoch aus dem Panzer heraus.
column19: enIt is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that WARTORTLE is very old.
column20: deMan sagt, es werde 10 000 Jahre alt. Sein buschiger Schweif ist ein Symbol für langes Leben.
column21: enWhen tapped, this POKéMON will pull in its head, but its tail will still stick out a little bit.
column22: enWhen tapped on its head, this Pokémon will pull it in, but its tail will still stick out a little bit.
column23: enIt often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For fast swimming, it moves its ears to maintain balance.
column24: enIt is said to live 10,000 years. Its furry tail is popular as a symbol of longevity.
column25: enWhen tapped, this Pokémon will pull in its head, but its tail will still stick out a little bit.
column26: enIt is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that Wartortle is very old.
column27: deEs gilt als Symbol für Langlebigkeit. Sehr alte Exemplare erkennt man daran, dass ihr Panzer mit Algen übersät ist.
column28: deSchillok hat einen langen, buschigen Schweif, dessen Farbe intensiver wird, wenn es altert. Die Kratzer auf seinem Panzer zeugen von seiner Kampfkraft.

column8: deNachdem es einen Gegner anvisiert hat, greift es mit einem Wasserstrahl an, dessen Druck höher ist als der eines Feuerwehrschlauchs.
column9: enThe pressurized water jets on this brutal Pokémon’s shell are used for high-speed tackles.
column10: enThe rocket cannons on its shell fire jets of water capable of punching holes through thick steel.
column11: enIt deliberately makes itself heavy so it can withstand the recoil of the water jets it fires.
column12: enThe waterspouts that protrude from its shell are highly accurate. Their bullets of water can precisely nail tin cans from a distance of over 160 feet.
column13: enBlastoise has water spouts that protrude from its shell. The water spouts are very accurate. They can shoot bullets of water with enough accuracy to strike empty cans from a distance of over 160 feet.
column14: deDie Wassersalven, die es mit den Wasserdüsen in seinem Panzer abfeuert, durchdringen sogar dicke Stahlwände.
column15: deEin mächtiges und schnelles Pokémon, das auf dem Rücken zwei Hochdruckwasserwerfer trägt.
column16: deTurtok besitzt Wasserdüsen, die aus seinem Panzer herausragen. Diese sind sehr präzise. Es kann Wassergeschosse so genau verschießen, dass es damit aus fast 50 m leere Dosen trifft.
column17: enThe pressurized water jets on this brutal POKéMON’s shell are used for high-speed tackles.
column18: enThe jets of water it spouts from the rocket cannons on its shell can punch through thick steel.
column19: enA brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.
column20: enIt crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.
column21: enIt firmly plants its feet on the ground before shooting water from the jets on its back.
column22: enBLASTOISE has water spouts that protrude from its shell. The water spouts are very accurate. They can shoot bullets of water with enough accuracy to strike empty cans from a distance of over 160 feet.
column23: enOnce it takes aim at its enemy, it blasts out water with even more force than a fire hose.
column24: deEs begräbt seine Gegner mit seinem enormen Körpergewicht. Wenn es in einer aussichtslosen Lage steckt, zieht es sich in seinen Panzer zurück.

column8: enIf you touch the feeler on top of its head, it will release a horrible stink to protect itself.
column9: enWhen attacked by bird Pokémon, it resists by releasing a terrifically strong odor from its antennae, but it often becomes their prey.
column10: deDie Saugnäpfe an den Beinen haften auf jedem Untergrund. Es sucht hartnäckig in Bäumen nach Futter.
column11: enIts body is soft and weak. In nature, its perpetual fate is to be seen by others as food.
column12: deBerührt man die Fühler auf seinem Kopf, so versucht es sich zu schützen, indem es einen penetranten Geruch absondert.
column13: deEs eignet sich bestens für frischgebackene Trainer, da es sich leicht fangen lässt und sich sehr schnell entwickelt.
column14: deEs versucht, angreifende Vogel-Pokémon mit dem Gestank aus seinen Antennen in die Flucht zu schlagen. Das gelingt ihm aber nicht immer.
column15: enCaterpie has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this Pokémon releases a terrifically strong odor.
column16: enIt is covered with a green skin. When it grows, it sheds the skin, covers itself with silk, and becomes a cocoon.
column17: enIt releases a stench from its red antenna to repel enemies. It grows by molting repeatedly.
column18: deEs hat Saugnäpfe an den Beinchen, mit denen es mühelos Steigungen und Mauern erklimmen kann.
column19: enIts voracious appetite compels it to devour leaves bigger than itself without hesitation. It releases a terribly strong odor from its antennae.
column20: enFor protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antennae on its head to drive away enemies.
column21: enPerhaps because it would like to grow up quickly, it has a voracious appetite, eating a hundred leaves a day.
column22: deAls Schutz vor Feinden sondert es einen übel riechenden Gestank mit seinen Antennen ab.
column23: deDas nimmersatte Raupy verschlingt 100 Blätter am Tag. Vermutlich strebt es so ein schnelleres Wachstum an.
column24: enIts short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.
column25: enFor protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antenna on its head to drive away enemies.
column26: enIt’s easy to catch, and it grows quickly, making it one of the top recommendations for novice Pokémon Trainers.
column27: deRaupy ist sehr gefräßig. Es kann Blätter verschlingen, die seine eigene Größe um ein Vielfaches übersteigen. Seine Antennen sondern einen übel riechenden Gestank ab.
column28: deSein weicher und schwacher Körper ist ein allseits beliebtes Futter. Es muss sich daher stets vor Angreifern in Acht nehmen.
column29: enIts feet have suction cups designed to stick to any surface. It tenaciously climbs trees to forage.
column30: enCATERPIE has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this POKéMON releases a terrifically strong odor.
column31: enIt crawls into foliage where it camouflages itself among leaves that are the same color as its body.
column32: deRaupy ist sehr gefräßig, es kann Blätter verschlingen, die größer sind als es selbst. Seine Antennen sondern einen übel riechenden Gestank ab.

column8: enThe shell covering this Pokémon’s body is as hard as an iron slab. Metapod does not move very much. It stays still because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the hard shell.
column9: enThe shell covering this POKéMON’s body is as hard as an iron slab. METAPOD does not move very much. It stays still because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the hard shell.
column10: enIt prepares for evolution by hardening its shell as much as possible to protect its soft body.
column11: enIts hard shell doesn’t crack a bit even if Pikipek pecks at it, but it will tip over, spilling out its insides.
column12: deDer Panzer dieses Pokémon ist hart wie Stahl. Safcon bewegt sich kaum, da es das weiche Innere unter seiner harten Schale auf seine Entwicklung vorbereitet.
column13: enIts shell is hard, but it’s still just a bug shell. It’s been known to break, so intense battles with it should be avoided.
column14: enThis POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.
column15: enIts shell is as hard as an iron slab. A METAPOD does not move very much because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the shell.
column16: enThis Pokémon is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.
column17: deIn seiner harten Schale ist ein weicher Körper. Einem brutalen Angriff hat es nichts entgegenzusetzen.
column18: deSein Panzer birgt ein dickflüssiges Inneres. In Vorbereitung auf seine Entwicklung wird seine Zellstruktur vollständig umgestaltet.
column19: enIts shell is filled with a thick liquid. All of the cells throughout its body are being rebuilt in preparation for evolution.
column20: deIn diesem Zustand wartet es auf die Entwicklung. Es kann nur seinen Panzer erhärten, daher bewegt es sich nicht, um nicht angegriffen zu werden.
column21: enInside the shell, it is soft and weak as it prepares to evolve. It stays motionless in the shell.
column22: deSein Panzer ist zwar hart, aber dennoch anfällig für Risse, da es ein Käfer-Pokémon ist. Für schwere Kämpfe ist es daher ungeeignet.
column23: enIt is waiting for the moment to evolve. At this stage, it can only harden, so it remains motionless to avoid attack.
column24: deEin Schnabelangriff von Peppeck kann Safcons hartem Panzer nichts anhaben, doch wenn es zu schaukeln beginnt, läuft sein Inneres aus.
column25: enEven though it is encased in a sturdy shell, the body inside is tender. It can’t withstand a harsh attack.
column26: enIts shell is filled with its soft innards. It doesn’t move much because of the risk it might carelessly spill its innards out.
column27: deDer stahlharte Panzer schützt seinen zarten Körper. Es wartet geduldig auf seine Entwicklung.
column28: enHardens its shell to protect itself. However, a large impact may cause it to pop out of its shell.
column29: enA steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
column30: deUm sich zu schützen, härtet es eifrig seinen Panzer, doch wenn es heftige Treffer einsteckt, wird sein Inneres entblößt.
column31: deWährend der Panzer dieses Pokémon sehr weich ist, bietet er keinen großen Schutz vor Attacken.
column32: deSein harter Panzer birgt ein weiches Inneres. Um zu vermeiden, dass dieses versehentlich ausläuft, bewegt es sich kaum.
column33: enThis is its pre-evolved form. At this stage, it can only harden, so it remains motionless to avoid attack.

column8: enIts wings, covered with poisonous powders, repel water. This allows it to fly in the rain.
column9: enThe wings are protected by rain-repellent dust. As a result, this Pokémon can fly about even in rain.
column10: deSmettbos größte Fähigkeit ist das Aufspüren köstlichen Blütenhonigs. Es findet sogar Honig in Blumen, die fast 10 km von seinem Nest entfernt blühen.
column11: deDa die hochgiftige Staubschicht auf seinen Flügeln wasserabweisend ist, kann es auch bei Regen umherfliegen.
column12: deWenn es sehr schnell mit den Flügeln schlägt, setzt es hochgiftigen Flügelstaub frei.
column13: enClose examination of its large eyes reveals that each eye is composed of a myriad of tiny eyes.
column14: deEs liebt den Blütenhonig schöner Blumen. Auf Blumenfeldern liefert es sich erbitterte Revierkämpfe mit Wommel.
column15: enIt has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can seek, extract, and carry honey from flowers blooming over six miles away.
column16: enButterfree has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can even search out, extract, and carry honey from flowers that are blooming over six miles from its nest.
column17: enIt loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.
column18: enNectar from pretty flowers is its favorite food. In fields of flowers, it has heated battles with Cutiefly for territory.
column19: deBei genauerer Betrachtung zeigt sich, dass seine zwei großen Augen jeweils aus einer Vielzahl an kleineren Augen bestehen.
column20: enIn battle, it flaps its wings at great speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
column21: deEs liebt Blütenhonig. Es findet selbst Blumen, die sehr wenig Pollen haben.
column22: deEs sammelt täglich Honig. Es reibt ihn in seine Beinhaare, um ihn in sein Nest zu transportieren.
column23: deSeine Flügel sind mit Wasser abweisendem Staub überzogen. Daher kann dieses Pokémon auch bei Regen fliegen.
column24: enIt collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest.
column25: enIts wings are covered in toxic scales. If it finds bird Pokémon going after Caterpie, Butterfree sprinkles its scales on them to drive them off.
column26: enBUTTERFREE has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can even search out, extract, and carry honey from flowers that are blooming over six miles from its nest.
column27: enIts wings, covered with poisonous powder, repel water. This allows it to fly in the rain.
column28: enIn battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
column29: enWater-repellent powder on its wings enables it to collect honey, even in the heaviest of rains.
column30: deWird es von einem anderen Pokémon angegriffen, wehrt es sich, indem es mit den Flügeln schlägt und giftigen Flügelstaub verstreut.
column31: enWhen attacked by other Pokémon, it defends itself by scattering its poisonous scales and fluttering its wings.
column32: deSieht es ein Raupy, das von Vogel-Pokémon angegriffen wird, schlägt es diese mit seinem hochgiftigen Flügelstaub in die Flucht.
column33: enIt flits from flower to flower, collecting honey. It can even identify distant flowers in bloom.
column34: enThe wings are protected by rain-repellent dust. As a result, this POKéMON can fly about even in rain.

column8: enIts poison stinger is very powerful. Its bright-colored body is intended to warn off its enemies.
column9: enA WEEDLE has an extremely acute sense of smell. It distinguishes its favorite kinds of leaves from those it dislikes by sniffing with its big red proboscis (nose).
column10: enOften found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.
column11: deHornliu verfügt über einen ausgezeichneten Geruchssinn. So kann es seine Lieblingsblätter von denen unterscheiden, die es nicht mag, indem es mit seiner großen roten Nase daran schnuppert.
column12: enIt eats its weight in leaves every day. It fends off attackers with the needle on its head.
column13: enBeware of the sharp stinger on its head. It hides in grass and bushes where it eats leaves.
column14: deSein Giftstachel ist gefährlich. Sein hellleuchtender Körper soll Feinde abschrecken.

column23: enIt uses its long beak to attack. It has a surprisingly long reach, so it must be treated with caution.
column24: deDieses Pokémon gehört einer sehr alten Spezies an. Wittert es Gefahr, so fliegt es sofort in große Höhen davon.
column25: enDrawings of a Pokémon resembling Fearow can be seen in murals from deep in ancient history.
column26: enIt shoots itself suddenly high into the sky, then plummets down in one fell swoop to strike its prey.
column27: enIt’s tough and has excellent stamina. It has no problem flying continuously for a whole day carrying a heavy load.
column28: deWer Essbares dabeihat, sollte sich nicht in Ibitaks Revier begeben, da sonst ein Überfall aus heiterem Himmel droht.
column29: deIbitak erkennt man an seinem langen Schnabel. Er ist hervorragend dafür geeignet, im Erdreich oder im Wasser Beute zu jagen. Es setzt seinen langen, dünnen Schnabel dabei sehr geschickt ein.
column30: enFEAROW is recognized by its long neck and elongated beak. They are conveniently shaped for catching prey in soil or water. It deftly moves its long and skinny beak to pluck prey.
column31: enIt has the stamina to keep flying all day on its broad wings. It fights by using its sharp beak.
column32: enWith its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.

column8: enMoves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole.
column9: deDieses Pokémon kann sich lautlos bewegen. Seine Nahrung sind die Eier von Vogel-Pokémon.
column10: enThe older it gets, the longer it grows. At night, it wraps its long body around tree branches to rest.
column11: enAn EKANS curls itself up in a spiral while it rests. This position allows it to quickly respond to an enemy from any direction with a threat from its upraised head.
column12: enEKANS curls itself up in a spiral while it rests. Assuming this position allows it to quickly respond to a threat from any direction with a glare from its upraised head.
column13: enIt flutters the tip of its tongue to seek out the scent of prey, then swallows the prey whole.
column14: enIt always hides in grass. When first born, it has no poison, so its bite is painful, but harmless.
column15: enThe eggs of bird Pokémon are its favorite food. It swallows eggs whole, so sometimes an egg gets stuck, and Ekans faints.
column16: enMoving silently and stealthily, it eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole.
column17: enIt can freely detach its jaw to swallow large prey whole. It can become too heavy to move, however.
column18: enEkans curls itself up in a spiral while it rests. Assuming this position allows it to quickly respond to a threat from any direction with a glare from its upraised head.
column19: deMit dem Alter wird der Körper dieses Pokémon immer länger. Nachts wickelt es sich um Äste, um zu ruhen.
column20: deDie Eier von Vogel-Pokémon, sein Leibgericht, verschlingt es am Stück. Bleibt ihm eines in der Kehle stecken, verliert es kurz das Bewusstsein.
column21: deMit dem Alter wird der Körper dieses Pokémon immer länger. Es schläft um Äste gewickelt.
column22: enBy dislocating its jaw, it can swallow prey larger than itself. After a meal, it curls up and rests.
column23: deEs hängt seinen Kiefer aus und verschlingt so selbst größere Beute am Stück. Danach rollt es sich zusammen und ruht sich aus.
column24: enMoving silently and stealthily, it eats the eggs of birds, such as Pidgey and Spearow, whole.
column25: deRettan rollt sich zu einer Spirale zusammen, wenn es sich ausruht. Aus dieser Haltung kann es blitzschnell auf Bedrohungen aus allen Richtungen reagieren, indem es seinen Kopf hebt.
column26: enA very common sight in grassland, etc. It flicks its tongue in and out to sense danger in its surroundings.
column27: enIt sneaks through grass without making a sound and strikes unsuspecting prey from behind.

column8: enAfter stunning its opponents with the pattern on its stomach, it quickly wraps them up in its body and waits for them to stop moving.
column9: enWith a very vengeful nature, it won’t give up the chase, no matter how far, once it targets its prey.
column10: enThis POKéMON has a terrifically strong constricting power. It can even flatten steel oil drums. Once it wraps its body around its foe, escaping is impossible.
column11: enThe frightening patterns on its belly have been studied. Six variations have been confirmed.
column12: deDieses Pokémon ist unheimlich stark. Es kann seine Beute mit seinem Körper umwickeln und sogar Ölfässer zerdrücken. Wenn Arbok einen Gegner umwickelt, ist es unmöglich, seinem Würgegriff zu entkommen.
column13: enWith a very vengeful nature, it won't give up the chase, no matter how far, once it targets its prey.
column14: enThis Pokémon is terrifically strong in order to constrict things with its body. It can even flatten steel oil drums. Once Arbok wraps its body around its foe, escaping its crunching embrace is impossible.
column15: enThe pattern on its belly appears to be a frightening face. Weak foes will flee just at the sight of the pattern.
column16: enTo intimidate foes, it spreads its chest wide and makes eerie sounds by expelling air from its mouth.
column17: enThe pattern on its belly is for intimidation. It constricts foes while they are frozen in fear.
column18: deVon dem furchterregenden Muster auf seinem Bauch wurden durch Studien bislang sechs verschiedene Varianten entdeckt.
column19: enThe latest research has determined that there are over 20 possible arrangements of the patterns on its stomach.
column20: enTransfixing prey with the face-like pattern on its belly, it binds and poisons the frightened victim.
column21: deJüngsten Forschungsergebnissen zufolge gibt es mehr als 20 verschiedene Musterungen, die Arboks Bauch aufweisen kann.
column22: deEs schüchtert seinen Gegner mit dem Muster auf seinem Bauch ein und nimmt ihn dann in den Würgegriff, bis es keinen Widerstand mehr spürt.
column23: deDas Muster auf seinem Bauch ähnelt einer Fratze. Schwache Gegner nehmen bereits beim Anblick Reißaus.
column24: enThis POKéMON is terrifically strong in order to constrict things with its body. It can even flatten steel oil drums. Once ARBOK wraps its body around its foe, escaping its crunching embrace is impossible.
column25: deUm Feinde einzuschüchtern, bläht es seine Brust auf und stößt unheimliche Laute durch sein Maul aus.
column26: enIt is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.

column8: deVor Kurzem wurden Pläne verkündet, mithilfe einer großen Anzahl an Pikachu ein ganzes Kraftwerk zu betreiben.
column9: enWhen several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
column10: deJe stärker die Elektrizität ist, die Pikachu produziert, desto weicher und elastischer sind seine Backentaschen.
column11: dePikachu ist in Wäldern zu Hause. Da es in seinen Backentaschen Elektrizität speichert, bekommt man einen Schlag, wenn man diese berührt.
column12: enIt lives in forests with others. It stores electricity in the pouches on its cheeks.
column13: enIt occasionally uses an electric shock to recharge a fellow PIKACHU that is in a weakened state.
column14: enPikachu that can generate powerful electricity have cheek sacs that are extra soft and super stretchy.
column15: enA plan was recently announced to gather many Pikachu and make an electric power plant.
column16: enIt stores electricity in the electric sacs on its cheeks. When it releases pent-up energy in a burst, the electric power is equal to a lightning bolt.
column17: enIf it looses crackling power from the electric pouches on its cheeks, it is being wary.
column18: deEs liegt in seiner Natur, konstant Elektrizität zu speichern. Die Wälder, in denen Pikachu leben, bergen stets die Gefahr eines Blitzgewitters.
column19: deEs hat kleine Backentaschen, die mit Elektrizität gefüllt sind. Bei Gefahr entlädt es sie.
column20: deSeine Backentaschen laden sich elektrisch auf, während es schläft. Bei Schlafmangel kann es nur Schwachstrom entladen.
column21: deEs streckt seinen Schweif nach oben, um seine Umgebung zu prüfen. Häufig fährt ein Blitz hinein.
column22: enWhen it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.
column23: enWhenever Pikachu comes across something new, it blasts it with a jolt of electricity. If you come across a blackened berry, it’s evidence that this Pokémon mistook the intensity of its charge.
column24: enPossesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.
column25: enIt’s in its nature to store electricity. It feels stressed now and then if it’s unable to fully discharge the electricity.
column26: enWhenever PIKACHU comes across something new, it blasts it with a jolt of electricity. If you come across a blackened berry, it’s evidence that this POKéMON mistook the intensity of its charge.
column27: enWhen several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity can build and cause lightning storms.
column28: enIt has small electric sacs on both its cheeks. If threatened, it looses electric charges from the sacs.
column29: enThis POKéMON has electricity-storing pouches on its cheeks. These appear to become electrically charged during the night while PIKACHU sleeps. It occasionally discharges electricity when it is dozy after waking up.
column30: dePikachu begrüßen einander, indem sie ihre Schweife aneinanderreiben und eine Ladung Strom durch diese gleiten lassen.
column31: deEs liegt in seiner Natur, konstant Elektrizität in sich anzustauen. Kann es diese nicht regelmäßig entladen, löst dies Stress aus.
column32: enIt occasionally uses an electric shock to recharge a fellow Pikachu that is in a weakened state.
column33: enWhile sleeping, it generates electricity in the sacs in its cheeks. If it’s not getting enough sleep, it will be able to use only weak electricity.
column34: enThis intelligent Pokémon roasts hard berries with electricity to make them tender enough to eat.
column35: enWhen Pikachu meet, they’ll touch their tails together and exchange electricity through them as a form of greeting.
column36: enIts nature is to store up electricity. Forests where nests of Pikachu live are dangerous, since the trees are so often struck by lightning.
column37: deDieses Pokémon kann in seinen Backentaschen Elektrizität speichern. Diese laden sich nachts auf, während Pikachu schläft. Es entlädt manchmal seine elektrische Ladung, wenn es gerade aufgewacht und noch schläfrig ist.
column38: enIt raises its tail to check its surroundings. The tail is sometimes struck by lightning in this pose.
column39: enThis forest-dwelling Pokémon stores electricity in its cheeks, so you’ll feel a tingly shock if you touch it.
column40: enThis Pokémon has electricity-storing pouches on its cheeks. These appear to become electrically charged during the night while Pikachu sleeps. It occasionally discharges electricity when it is dozy after waking up.
column41: enThis intelligent POKéMON roasts hard BERRIES with electricity to make them tender enough to eat.
column42: enIt keeps its tail raised to monitor its surroundings. If you yank its tail, it will try to bite you.
column43: deImmer wenn Pikachu auf etwas Neues stößt, jagt es einen Elektroschock hindurch. Wenn du eine verkohlte Beere findest, hat dieses Pokémon seine elektrische Ladung falsch eingeschätzt.

column8: enIts long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
column9: enIf it stores too much electricity, its behavior turns aggressive. To avoid this, it occasionally discharges excess energy and calms itself down.
column10: deJe mehr es sich elektrisch auflädt, desto aggressiver wird es. Man vermutet, dass die Elektrizität den Stress verursache.
column11: enIf the electrical sacks become excessively charged, RAICHU plants its tail in the ground and discharges. Scorched patches of ground will be found near this POKéMON’s nest.
column12: deSein langer Schweif dient ihm zur Erdung. So bleibt es von der lähmenden Wirkung von Hochspannung selbst verschont.
column13: deWenn seine elektrische Ladung zu groß wird, entlädt Raichu seine Energie ins Erdreich. Neben dem Nest dieses Pokémon findet man häufig versengtes Erdreich.
column14: enBecause so many Trainers like the way Pikachu looks, you don’t see this Pokémon very often.
column15: enIf the electric pouches in its cheeks become fully charged, both ears will stand straight up.
column16: enThis Pokémon exudes a weak electrical charge from all over its body that makes it take on a slight glow in darkness. Raichu plants its tail in the ground to discharge electricity.
column17: enIt unleashes electric shocks that can reach 100,000 volts. When agitated, it can knock out even an Indian elephant.
column18: deEin eher seltenes Pokémon, da viele Trainer Pikachu bevorzugen.
column19: enWhen its electricity builds, its muscles are stimulated, and it becomes more aggressive than usual.
column20: enIts long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high voltage power.
column21: enIt can discharge bursts of electricity exceeding 100,000 volts— a single strike with that amount of power would incapacitate one of the Copperajah of my homeland.
column22: deDieses Pokémon gibt eine schwache elektrische Ladung ab. Dadurch glüht es bei Dunkelheit leicht. Raichu entlädt Elektrizität, indem es sein Hinterteil in den Boden gräbt.
column23: deSeine elektrischen Ladungen erreichen bis zu 100000 V. Bei unvorsichtigem Kontakt wird sogar ein indischer Elefant bewusstlos.
column24: deEs kann 100 000 V mit einem Schlag freisetzen und so viel größere Gegner besiegen.
column25: enIf the electrical sacs become excessively charged, Raichu plants its tail in the ground and discharges. Scorched patches of ground will be found near this Pokémon’s nest.
column26: enIts tail discharges electricity into the ground, protecting it from getting shocked.
column27: deWenn es sich elektrisch auflädt, steigt seine Aggressivität. Selbst sein Trainer läuft dann Gefahr, von ihm angegriffen zu werden.
column28: enWhen electricity builds up inside its body, it becomes feisty. It also glows in the dark.
column29: enIt turns aggressive if it has too much electricity in its body. It discharges power through its tail.
column30: enIts electric charges can reach even 100,000 volts. Careless contact can cause even an Indian elephant to faint.
column31: enAs electricity builds up inside its body, it becomes more aggressive. One theory is that the electricity buildup is actually causing stress.
column32: deWenn der in seinen Backentaschen gespeicherte Strom leer ist, stellt es seinen Schweif auf, um Elektrizität aus der Luft zu ziehen.
column33: enIf its electric pouches run empty, it raises its tail to gather electricity from the atmosphere.
column34: enThis POKéMON exudes a weak electrical charge from all over its body that makes it take on a slight glow in darkness. RAICHU searches for electricity by planting its tail in the ground.
column35: deWenn sich in seinem Körper Elektrizität anstaut, wird es aggressiv. Man kann es auch im Dunkeln leuchten sehen.
column36: enIt becomes aggressive when it has electricity stored up. At such times, even its Trainer has to take care to avoid being attacked.
column37: deWenn es sich auflädt, zucken seine Muskeln und es wird aggressiver und kampflustiger.
column38: enIt can loose 100,000-volt bursts of electricity, instantly downing foes several times its size.

column8: enSANDSHREW’s body is configured to absorb water without waste, enabling it to survive in an arid desert. This POKéMON curls up to protect itself from its enemies.
column9: deEs kann sich blitzschnell durch die Wüste fortbewegen, indem es sich zu einem Ball zusammenrollt.
column10: enIt prefers dry, sandy places because it uses the sand to protect itself when threatened.
column11: enIt burrows into the ground to create its nest. If hard stones impede its tunneling, it uses its sharp claws to shatter them and then carries on digging.

column20: deSein Gesang unterscheidet sich je nach der Region, in der es lebt. Mancherorts erinnert er mehr an Geschrei.

column22: enIf it inflates to sing a lullaby, it can perform longer and cause sure drowsiness in its audience.
column23: enIf it inflates to SING a lullaby, it can perform longer and cause sure drowsiness in its audience.

column27: deWenn es Gesang einsetzt, steigt seine Ausdauer und seine Zuhörer werden in Tiefschlaf versetzt.
column28: enIt captivates foes with its huge, round eyes, then lulls them to sleep by singing a soothing melody.
column29: deIn der Bettenabteilung von Kaufhäusern erhält man auch CDs mit Pummeluffs wundersam einlullendem Gesang.
column30: enUses its cute round eyes to enrapture its foe. It then sings a pleasing melody that lulls the foe to sleep.
column31: enJigglypuff possess a vocal range that exceeds 12 octaves, but each individual’s singing skill depends on its own effort.
column32: enWhen it wavers its big, round eyes, it begins singing a lullaby that makes everyone drowsy.
column33: enLooking into its cute, round eyes makes it start singing a song so pleasant listeners can’t help but fall asleep.
column34: enLooking into its cute, round eyes causes it to sing a relaxing melody, inducing its enemies to sleep.
column35: enWhen its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.
column36: enUses its alluring eyes to enrapture its foe. It then sings a pleasing melody that lulls the foe to sleep.
column37: enNothing can avoid falling asleep hearing a JIGGLYPUFF’s song. The sound waves of its singing voice match the brain waves of someone in a deep sleep.
column38: enRecordings of Jigglypuff’s strange lullabies can be purchased from department stores. These CDs can be found near the bedding area.
column39: enWhen its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.
column40: enWhen this Pokémon sings, it never pauses to breathe. If it is in a battle against an opponent that does not easily fall asleep, Jigglypuff cannot breathe, endangering its life.

column8: enTheir fur feels so good that if two of them snuggle together, they won’t want to be separated.
column9: enThe body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.
column10: enIt has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a BODY SLAM.
column11: enIts body is very elastic. By inhaling deeply, it can continue to inflate itself without limit.
column12: enIts fur is extremely fine, dense, and supple. The exquisitely pleasant fur conveys an image of luxury.

column17: enIts body is full of elasticity. By inhaling deeply, it can continue to inflate itself without limit.
column18: deKnuddeluffs Körper ist sehr dehnbar. Indem es tief einatmet, kann sich dieses Pokémon selbst aufblasen. Wenn es aufgepumpt ist, hüpft es wie ein Luftballon umher.

column20: enWIGGLYTUFF’s body is very flexible. By inhaling deeply, this POKéMON can inflate itself seemingly without end. Once inflated, WIGGLYTUFF bounces along lightly like a balloon.
column21: enIts fine fur feels so pleasant, those who accidentally touch it cannot take their hands away.

column24: enIt sheds its fine fur when the seasons change. The fur is gathered and spun into a luxurious yarn.
column25: deDank seines elastischen Körpers und feinen Fells ist es sehr beliebt. Es fühlt sich herrlich an, mit Knuddeluff in den Armen einzuschlafen.
column26: enWigglytuff’s body is very flexible. By inhaling deeply, this Pokémon can inflate itself seemingly without end. Once inflated, Wigglytuff bounces along lightly like a balloon.

column28: enTheir fur feels so good that if two of them snuggle together, they won't want to be separated.
column29: deEs kann sich größer machen, indem es Luft einatmet. Mit Artgenossen wetteifert es, wer sich am meisten aufblasen kann.
column30: enAs it inhales, it expands...and expands...and expands. Wigglytuff compete to see which one can inflate itself the most.
column31: deKnuddeluffs weiches Fell ist sein ganzer Stolz. Besonders die Locke auf seiner Stirn fühlt sich herrlich an.

column38: deSein Fell ist so flauschig, dass, wenn zwei zusammenstehen, sie nicht getrennt werden möchten.
column39: deKnuddeluff hat handtellergroße Augen, die immer mit Tränenflüssigkeit bedeckt sind. Gerät Staub in die Augen dieses Pokémon, so wird dieser sofort ausgespült.
